$comment: Familiar species (design doc S4). The kith is a collection of individuals: at most ONE familiar of each species ever walks with the warden (each has unique plate art), and each species carries a single fixed trait. A node specialist now works a PAIR of related nodes (e.g. copper + tin), so one familiar answers either node's gift pile and boosts both wherever it is posted or when it wanders. Trait kinds the sim interprets: nodeYieldBonus (at a node whose resource is in trait.resources), trailThroughputBonus (holding the trail post), digSpeedBonus (at a watch site), pristineBonus (points at its node, any resource). Node specialists arrive by gift pile at either of their nodes (one pile per verse sung); the carrier arrives through the recruit rungs and bonds. The roster is sized to the gatherable nodes: seven pair-specialists cover zones 1-4 plus rare-herbs, and each species' animal matches the powerup it gives. Names each start with a distinct letter. Values are first guesses.

trait.name: Meadow-forager
trait.description: +40% yield at berry and wildflower nodes

trait.name: Mast-hoarder
trait.description: +40% yield at nut and mushroom nodes

trait.name: Nest-weaver
trait.description: +40% yield at fibre and reed nodes

trait.name: Hedge-browser
trait.description: +40% yield at herb and rare-herb nodes

trait.name: Ore-tunneler
trait.description: +40% yield at copper scree and tin seam nodes

trait.name: Earth-rooter
trait.description: +40% yield at clay and iron gravel nodes

trait.name: Grove-and-river hunter
trait.description: +40% yield at timber and fishing nodes

trait.name: Deep pockets
trait.description: +25% throughput when it holds the trail post
